verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I hope to live till Jesus comes back to this earth again, And catches up His chosen bride, a thousand years to reign, But should I die before that time I know this empty clay, Will be caught up to meet the Lord; I’ll be there anyway.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh praise the Lord for this great hope That cheers me day by day, For if I’m not caught up alive, I’ll be there anyway.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: So farewell friends if we should part on earth to meet no more, I’ll meet you in the skies some day when earthy clouds are rolled But should I die before that time and you are alive that day, Just look for me for I intend, to be there anyway.
